eligibilityQuestions.text: Are you a Category I or II Alternative Investment Funds (AIF) registered with Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI) or have applied for the same with SEBI?
What is your Fund Target Size?
Startup as defined as per the Gazette Notification G.S.R.364 (E) dt. 11/04/2019 issued by Government of India and as amended from time to time)

Does your Fund agree to invest at least twice the amount of contribution sought from Fund of Funds for Startups (FFS) into Startups?

For instance, if contribution sought is Rs 100 crore, Fund should invest at least Rs 200 crore in Startups as defined as per the Gazette Notification G.S.R.364 (E) dt. 11/04/2019 issued by Government of India and as amended from time to time)
Does the Fund Manager / team have prior track record in Fund management or prior investment experience?

Do all the Key members* of the Fund have CIBIL score more than 650?

Key member is defined as Director, Sponsor and Senior Personnel of the Fund.

Do all the Key members are legally eligible to be a Director or in a Managerial position under Indian law? (i.e., not barred to be a Director or in a Managerial position under Indian Law)

Key member is defined as Director, Sponsor and Senior Personnel of the Fund.
